title: Latvian Prime Minister Evika Siliņa steps down
summary_full: Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity) has resigned, New Unity's faction leader Edmunds Jurēvics confirmed to Latvian Television on Thursday, May 14. Evika Siliņa also announced this in a media briefing shortly after.
